name: CLX - MGA Insurance Review Documentation v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Internal-call. Auto-generates review documentation HTML, uploads to private R2 at /reviews/insurance/{client_id}/, sets policy_reviews.documentation_url. Phase 5b: chains to e-signature for client acknowledgment.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', policy_review_id: $('Render HTML').item.json.review.id, documentation_url: ($env.R2_PUBLIC_URL || 'https://videos.crystallux.org') + '/' + $('Render HTML').item.json.storage_key }) }}
